title: Assign Person column within workforms

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Here is a small tip for how to assign a person directly from a form with the help of the VLOOKUP marketplace app.

  1. Create a repository board with a people colun and drop down column
  2. Create items matching between a person and a drop down selection
  3. Connect the repository board with the board you have your form using VLOOKUP
  4. From now, when a form is submitted with a drop down selection, VLOOKUP will match between the dropdown selection to the person and auto assign them

Here is a short video demo
